summary: Comprehensive testing of LexiMaster student login bug fix and core features. All critical flows verified working: student login with 6-digit PIN (bug fix confirmed), guardian registration/login, student management, and marketplace. 16/16 backend tests passed, frontend UI tests all passed.
critical_code_review_comments: The bug fix is working correctly - startup migration assigns student_codes to existing students
PIN validation now accepts both 6 and 9 digit PINs correctly
Frontend PIN label updated from '9-Digit PIN' to 'PIN' with helpful hint text
seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing - guardians and students with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Student login bug fix verified working. Existing students (Alice Johnson STU-8SXESE:526173, SJ STU-DR40V7:914027) can login with 6-digit PINs. New students get 9-digit PINs. All core flows (guardian registration/login, student management, marketplace) working correctly.

backend_api_tests: Student login with 6-digit PIN (Alice Johnson, SJ)
Student login with wrong PIN/code (rejection verified)
Word banks list and detail APIs
frontend_ui_tests: Landing page renders with all navigation links
Student login form with updated PIN hint
Student login with 6-digit PIN navigates to Academy
Student Academy displays student name and stats
Guardian portal with student cards showing code and PIN

bug_verification.root_cause: Existing students had 6-digit PINs but system required 9-digit, also missing student_code field
bug_verification.fix_applied: 1) Startup migration adds student_code to existing students, 2) PIN validation accepts any length, 3) Frontend label updated
bug_verification.verification_result: PASSED - Both existing students (Alice, SJ) can login with 6-digit PINs
